steps.speaker: Shipbuilder Neri
steps.text: You still need 5 Stonebind Rivets. Search for them in the Stone Vault.

steps.speaker: Shipbuilder Neri
steps.text: These will do nicely. Give me a moment.

steps.speaker: Shipbuilder Neri
steps.text: That bridge should last another 20 years at least. Thanks for your help.
